eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 07:19 AM ON FEB 25, 2026 Effective until 01:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
UPDATED - AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Austin, Texas. Missing child is Jazzlyn Anzora, 12 year old White female last seen wearing a red sweater, white long sleeve shirt, Christmas themed pants, and a Nike backpack. Suspect and vehicle located. Call Travis County Sheriff's Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1. AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from Austin, Texas. Missing child is Jazzlyn Anzora, 12 year old White female last seen wearing a red sweater, white long sleeve shirt, Christmas themed pants, and a Nike backpack. Call Travis County Sheriff's Office with information. If seen call 9 1 1..
